title: Hatch n Grow Large - Mermaid Egg from Deluxebase, 11cm Water-Activated Hatching Egg & Surprise Growing Mermaid Toy, Fun Educational Animal Toys & Gifts for Kids.
features: MAGICAL HATCHING MERMAID EGG: Submerge the large 11cm egg in water and watch as a surprise mermaid breaks out of its shell within 48 hours — a fun and fascinating reveal for children!
GROW YOUR OWN MERMAID: After hatching, keep your mermaid in water and watch it continue to grow over the next 14 days! Kids will love checking their mermaids progress daily!

EDUCATIONAL & SURPRISING FUN: These hatching eggs combine hands-on learning with exciting surprise play! Great for teaching patience and responsibility, and perfect egg toys for gifts, party bags, Easter treats or stocking fillers.

DISCOVER THE ENTIRE RANGE: Deluxebase Hatch 'N' Grow eggs offer the biggest variety with 31 unique designs of egg surprise toys across two sizes – 11cm and 6.5cm. From dinosaur eggs to unicorn eggs, kids will love to hatch, grow, and collect them all!

BUY WITH CONFIDENCE: With over 25 years of experience, Deluxebase specialises in designing fun and educational toys, and gifts for kids and adults, in the UK, the US, and Europe. We carefully crafted all of our products by maintaining the highest quality and safety, so that you can purchase our products with confidence.
description: Hatch excitement with Deluxebase’s Hatch 'N' Grow – Mermaid! This 11cm hatching egg is the perfect surprise toy that transforms into a growing mermaid when placed in water. Watch as your mermaid hatches and continues to grow over 14 days, making it a captivating experience for kids! With 12 unique designs in the 11cm size and 19 designs in the 6.5cm size, Hatch 'N' Grow eggs offer a fun and exciting collection. Available in the following designs: 11cm Size (12 Designs): Shark egg, Crocodile egg, Flamingo egg, Mermaid egg, Penguin egg, T-Rex egg, Triceratops egg, Unicorn egg, Stegosaurus egg, Dragon egg, Clown Fish egg, and Sea Turtle egg. 6.5cm Size (19 Designs): Astronaut egg, Flamingo egg, Owl egg, Panda egg, Parrot egg, Shark egg, Sloth egg, Stegosaurus egg, T-Rex egg, Triceratops egg, Unicorn egg, Mermaid egg, Alien egg, Axolotl egg, Capybara egg, Crocodile egg, Llama egg, Penguin egg, Black Bear egg. These surprise toys make wonderful gifts, party favours, and collectibles for kids aged 3 and up. The grow eggs are perfect for sensory play, party bag fillers, and gifts, making them great for birthdays, Easter baskets, and everyday fun. The safe, kid-friendly materials ensure a worry-free experience, while the toy encourages STEM learning through hands-on play. Features: Large 11cm surprise egg with a growing mermaid Hatches within a few days and grows for up to 14 days Over 30 collectible designs Educational & interactive toy Great for sensory play Safe, kid-friendly materials Perfect for Easter eggs, gifts, and party favours Ideal for STEM play and imaginative fun
